title: Government response to the Telecoms Supply Chain Diversification Advisory Council report
body: "This is the government response to the Telecoms Supply Chain Diversification Advisory Council’s independent report and recommendations on the security and resilience risks in the UK’s telecoms supply chains.  It outlines how the government will respond to the report’s recommendations to:   improve the security and resilience of our telecoms supply chains support growth and innovation in the UK’s advanced connectivity technologies ecosystem.   "
